# godaddy_domain_settings (Resource)

Manage selected mutable settings on an existing GoDaddy domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Existing GoDaddy domain to manage.

### Optional

- `consent` (Block, Optional) Consent payload used when enabling WHOIS exposure fields. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--consent))
- `expose_registrant_organization` (Boolean) WHOIS organization exposure flag.
- `expose_whois` (Boolean) WHOIS exposure flag.
- `locked` (Boolean) Domain lock flag.
- `renew_auto` (Boolean) Auto-renew flag.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `expiration_protected` (Boolean) Expiration protection flag.
- `expires_at` (String) Expiration timestamp.
- `hold_registrar` (Boolean) Registrar hold flag.
- `id` (String) Canonical resource identifier equal to the domain name.
- `name_servers` (List of String) Current nameserver set.
- `privacy` (Boolean) Privacy flag.
- `renew_deadline` (String) Renewal deadline timestamp.
- `status` (String) Current domain status.
- `transfer_protected` (Boolean) Transfer protection flag.

<a id="nestedblock--consent"></a>
### Nested Schema for `consent`

Required:

- `agreed_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of consent.
- `agreed_by` (String) IP address of the consenting actor.
- `agreement_keys` (List of String) Agreement keys accepted by the actor.
